column1: Hey Keira, thanks for your interest in traveling with SpringBreak U by Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from SpringBreak U here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
cool i got you, which destination were you lookin to book?
dopee Cancun is lit for spring break, gonna be a good time
how many ppl in your group so far?
Loved “dopee Cancun is lit for spring break, gonna be a good time”
There's about 6 of us right now I think
Still trying to just get an idea and then will get more of an exact number
word thats solid! we all from the same school?
dope which school? I'll hook it up with a group rate
niceee we have a bunch of groups from Bama this year, y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
Thank you! As soon as it is possible
bet! cool if i send through email? its a little long for text
just sent that over, lmk if you got it
hey whats up gonna set up the reservation for you! did we want to do 4 nights or 5?
I think there is going to be like 11 of us now
Still asking around to make sure it's definite
okay cool. I see you started a res from the quote, gonna update that and send it back over
And did we decide on grand oasis or krystal
should be all set! just updated it and emailed over
Hi! I was just wondering if I could get on the phone with anyone to talk about our trip? We may have one person cancel and was wondering about how to get the money back and stuff
Hey! Yea no prob, did the person add the travel protection insurance to their trip?
hey just looked on your reservation and it ma not bee too late for them to add the travel protection insurance
heres the link they wanna follow to add it in. woud tell them to do it like today def cutting it close https://www.travelinsured.com/agency/
once they do that, would recommend waiting a day, and then they send a email to me at spiffy@springbreaku.com, saying that they want to cancel
that'll be needed to start their claims process. I'm around for a call today if you wanna hop on
Hi! I was looking at the cancellation reasons and stuff with the travel insurance and nothing would work for that. Is there anything else to do to at least get a little bit of the money back?
Yea it's a cancel for any reason policy, so you should be fine either way
No we were looking at it with the parents and they didn't think it was worth it because it said to cancel for certain reasons you would have to provide doctors notes and stuff like that
Is that's the cancel for any reason policy section?
The insurance route is the only way to receive a refund so I def recommend adding it in if they haven't yet
Yeah all of the plans that you can buy when you click on plan details they all say it has to be a documented and proven reason
Can we add the 48 dollar one and get a refund with that?
What was the reason they wanted to cancel?
No passport. It won't come in time and we dont have the correct documentation to get one here at school
And I'm not too sure honestly. I think you're good with that. But ultimately it's all handled directly through travel insured so I'm not too well versed on the policies and processes
That sounds like a valid reason to me!
I would recommend they put that on the claim
How does it work after you get the insurance?
And also once one person cancels do the others have to pay more?

Once you have the insurance, you then reach out to us via email requesting a cancellation of the trip. We cancel on our end and send the document / proof of purchase that helps you support your claim. You then file a claim with travel insured, with the provided document
Hey! I was just wondering if there is transportation from back and forth to the clubs included in the party pack?
Hey hey. Nah the party center is a quick 5 min ride down the road. Everyone takes the trolly that passes by the resort every 15 minutes. It's $1 each way
safe travels today! weeks gonna be lit
Fire, the team will take care of you. lmk if you need anything
